'''âl-l-f-l''' ('''kalalfeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elaidinize|elaidinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elaidinize|elaidinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-l-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| kalalfeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilalfeloko|thilalfeloko]] || [[word:jilalfeloko|jilalfeloko]] || [[word:shilalfeloko|shilalfeloko]] || [[word:kilalfeloko|kilalfeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulalfeloko|thuthulalfeloko]] || [[word:jujulalfeloko|jujulalfeloko]] || [[word:shushulalfeloko|shushulalfeloko]] || [[word:kukulalfeloko|kukulalfeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholalfeloko|tholalfeloko]] || [[word:jolalfeloko|jolalfeloko]] || [[word:sholalfeloko|sholalfeloko]] || [[word:kolalfeloko|kolalfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlalfeloko|thĂŠlalfeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠlalfeloko|jĂŠlalfeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠlalfeloko|shĂŠlalfeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠlalfeloko|kĂŠlalfeloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalfeloko|thalalfeloko]] || [[word:jalalfeloko|jalalfeloko]] || [[word:shalalfeloko|shalalfeloko]] || [[word:kalalfeloko|kalalfeloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
